commit.message:
8381703

Hi all,

  please review this fix for a race reading `root_regions()->num_available_regions()`: the `work_remaining()` and the following `num_remaining_regions()` calls are racy in that between the invocations in `G1ConcurrentMark::scan_root_regions()` there can be changes of that value, leading to assertion failures.

The fix is to use one consistent value throughout the processing: the code is already race-safe, at worst the concurrent processing will do some extra work.

Testing: gha, original problem could be reproduced 1/5 of times after adding a `Thread::naked_sleep(999)` between the readings of `num_remaining_regions()` running the `gc/g1/TestShrinkAuxiliaryDataRunner.java` test, no failures after 102 iterations with the fix (and the delay).

Thanks,
  Thomas
